pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5) explicitly states report location; export_result.sh (line 9) and setup_task.sh (line 100) confirm path
verifier.py line 46 docstring states 'Pass Threshold: 70'; line 192 shows 'passed = score >= 70'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to create a system health report file at /home/ga/system_health_report.txt with specific system information (Emoncms version, MySQL version, PHP version, Redis status, MQTT status, feed count, and input count). The task uses synthetic data: a Docker-based Emoncms environment with seeded energy monitoring data (6 feeds and 30 days of simulated power curves) created during environment initialization. The minimum passing score is 70 points out of 100, with scoring based on accuracy of reported values. The verifier checks file creation timing, count tolerances (±1 for feeds, ±2 for inputs), and version matching.
